items.title: Argentina formally ratifies the Nairobi Wreck Removal Convention
items.summary: In a recent client newsletter shared in late June 2026, Gard's correspondent in Argentina, Simonsen, reports that Argentina has formally ratified the Nairobi International Convention on the Removal of Wrecks (2007), following the enactment of Law No. 27,812 on 20 May 2026. The ratification introduce
items.summary_zh: 阿根廷於2026年5月20日通過27,812號法案，正式批准了2007年奈洛比國際打撈公約。

items.title: AIS-assisted collisions: The risks of over-reliance
items.summary: AIS has evolved into an important safety aid for situational awareness and even collision avoidance. However, this evolution also brings new risks, and over-reliance on AIS may, in some cases, contribute to incidents rather than prevent them.
items.summary_zh: AIS雖然已成為重要的安全輔助工具，但過度依賴AIS可能在某些情況下導致事故，而非預防事故。

items.title: Emergency power system: Will it work in a blackout?
items.summary: Findings from the Tokyo MoU and IACS indicate that routine testing may not reflect how emergency power systems perform during a real loss of main power. Inadequate testing can leave critical systems unproven and create a false sense of readiness among crew when it matters most.
items.summary_zh: 東京公約組織與國際船級社的研究顯示，常規測試可能無法真實反映緊急電力系統在主電力失效時的表現。不充分的測試可能使關鍵系統未經證實，並在關鍵時刻讓船員產生錯誤的準備感。

items.title: Rise in fishery claims in South Korea waters
items.summary: Gard has observed a rise in navigation incidents involving fishing nets over the past year. Our correspondent, KOMOS, reports that issues with offshore stow nets remain persistent, largely due to minimal restrictions on where this gear can be installed outside of designated anchorages and prohibited
items.summary_zh: Gard觀察到過去一年在南韓水域涉及漁網的航行事故有所增加。KOMOS報告指出，離岸儲網的問題仍然持續，主要是因為對於這些設備安裝地點的限制較少，除了指定的錨地和禁止區域外。

items.title: US courts signal shift in the interpretation of “package” under COGSA
items.summary:
Recent decisions from the Southern District of New York, affirmed by the Second Circuit, suggest a more contractual approach to determining what constitutes a “package” under the Carriage of Goods by Sea Act (COGSA).

By giving effect to express package definitions in bills of lading, the courts may
items.summary_zh: 美國法院，特別是第二巡迴法院（紐約），最近的判決顯示出對《海上貨物運送法》（COGSA）中“包裹”定義的解釋將更具契約性。法院可能會依據提單中的明確包裹定義來進行裁決。

items.title: An exciting start to a career at sea
items.summary: Cadetship is a great way to start your career at sea and for Gard’s latest sponsored cadet, Harriet Harding, it was even more so as she joined the Royal Research Ship Sir David Attenborough for the first sea phase of her cadetship.
items.summary_zh: 學員計畫是開始海上職業的好方法，Gard 最新贊助的學員 Harriet Harding 加入了皇家研究船 Sir David Attenborough，開始她的學員海上階段。

items.title: Polar Code on the PSC agenda
items.summary: Paris MOU has launched an inspection campaign to verify compliance with the requirements of the Polar Code. The campaign will be run over two periods, the first inspection period started on 13 June and will last until 1 July 2022, the second period will run from 1 to 19 August 2022.
items.summary_zh: 巴黎公約組織啟動了一項檢查活動，以驗證對極地規範的遵守情況。該活動將分為兩個檢查期間，第一個檢查期從2022年6月13日開始，持續到7月1日，第二個檢查期將於2022年8月1日至19日進行。

items.title: Face masks are effective transmission barriers against infections
items.summary: Respiratory viruses can lead to significant illness and in some cases even death. One of the most effective infection control strategies is to wear a face mask.
items.summary_zh: 佩戴口罩是有效的感染控制策略，能有效阻止呼吸道病毒的傳播，減少重大疾病及死亡的風險。

items.title: Marine plastic pollution - are nurdles a special case for regulation?
items.summary: The IMO Pollution Prevention and Response Sub-Committee (PPR) will meet on 4-8 April.  Proposals to regulate the carriage of pre-production plastic pellets, so called “nurdles”, are on the agenda. Our authors discuss the cause and effect of nurdle spills and the specifics of the proposals on the age
items.summary_zh: 國際海事組織污染防治與應對小組將於4月4日至8日召開會議，議程中將討論對預生產塑膠顆粒（即「nurdles」）運輸的規範提案。

items.title: Feeling unwell? Report and recover but don’t pass it to others
items.summary: Any one of us can fall sick with a viral infection. What do we do? We take prescribed medicines and try to stay away from our family and friends until we have recovered. This is us being ‘socially responsible’.
items.summary_zh: 任何人都可能感染病毒，應該服用醫生開的藥物並儘量避免與家人和朋友接觸，直到康復，這是我們的社會責任。

items.title: Singapore bunkers - presence of chlorinated hydrocarbons
items.summary: Gard Members and clients are reporting operational problems that may be caused by contaminated bunkers, mostly HSFO, stemmed in Singapore in the first quarter of 2022.
items.summary_zh: Gard 會員和客戶報告在2022年第一季度於新加坡加油的重油（HSFO）可能受到污染，導致操作問題。

items.title: Does your onboard hygiene management cover high touch surfaces?
items.summary: Although not visible to the naked eye, germs live among us. They are more likely to be present on surfaces which people touch quite frequently with their hands. These are known as as ‘high touch surfaces’.
items.summary_zh: 雖然肉眼看不見，但細菌存在於我們周圍。它們更可能存在於人們經常用手觸摸的表面，這些被稱為「高接觸表面」。

items.title: Ukrainian seafarer repatriation
items.summary: As the conflict in Ukraine continues, many Members and clients are having difficulties repatriating Ukrainian crew. Some crew members may want to extend their contracts given the turbulence and uncertainty of the situation; others will want to terminate their contracts earlier than intended in order
items.summary_zh: 隨著烏克蘭衝突持續，許多會員和客戶在遣返烏克蘭船員方面遇到困難。一些船員可能希望延長合約，而另一些則希望提前終止合約。

items.title: One is the loneliest number – the enduring practice of the “on board bill of lading”
items.summary: An original bill which has been carried on board has no practical value as evidence of title and the practice remains inherently risky because of the difficulty in verifying which party is entitled to possession of the cargo if none of the negotiated bills are available.
items.summary_zh: 在船上攜帶的原始提單對於所有權的證明沒有實際價值，且由於難以驗證哪一方有權擁有貨物，這種做法本質上存在風險。

items.title: Export season for Brazilian soya beans is underway – reminder for the recommended precautions
items.summary: The Brazilian soya bean export season is underway with the bulk of the beans scheduled for export in March, April and May.  The long voyage time to Chinese ports together with pandemic related delay in discharge increase the risk of natural deterioration and cargo claims.  Documentation of care of t
items.summary_zh: 巴西大豆出口季節已開始，主要出口時間為三月、四月和五月。前往中國港口的長途航行及疫情相關的卸貨延遲，增加了自然劣變和貨物索賠的風險。
